tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Anime is a Japanese animation style known for colorful characters and imaginative storytelling.

tab2.title: Characteristics
tab2.content: Anime often includes fantasy worlds, powerful characters, dramatic battles and emotional storytelling.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Popular anime include Naruto, One Piece, Dragon Ball and Attack on Titan.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Sports involve physical competitions between individuals or teams.

tab2.title: Skills
tab2.content: Athletes develop strength, speed, endurance and coordination.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Sports events attract millions of viewers worldwide.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Fruits are edible plant structures rich in vitamins and nutrients.

tab2.title: Health Benefits
tab2.content: Fruits improve digestion, immunity and overall health.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: There are thousands of fruit varieties across the world.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Vehicles are machines used to transport people and goods.

tab2.title: Technology
tab2.content: Modern vehicles use advanced engines and electronic systems.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: The fastest vehicles include supersonic jets and high-speed trains.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Animals are living organisms that move and consume other organisms for food.

tab2.title: Adaptations
tab2.content: Animals evolve abilities like flight, swimming and camouflage.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Scientists discover new animal species every year.
